My name is Derek Tran.

I am the son of Vietnamese immigrants, a US Army veteran, father, and small business owner.

I believe our elected leaders should work for the people they represent, not their own self interests.

media_json:
[{"type": "photo", "url": "https://pbs.twimg.com/media/GR_XS9IaMAImdrP.png", "alt_text": "Statement from Senator Martin Heinrich on President Joe Biden’s Re-Election Campaign

WASHINGTON, D.C. – Today New Mexico Senator Martin Heinrich issued the following statement about President Joe Biden’s re-election campaign.

“I love Joe Biden. He’s the most accomplished President of my lifetime and he’s a genuinely wonderful human being. However, what I care most about is the preservation of our democracy. President Biden needs to continue to demonstrate that his debate performance was just a bad night, and that he has a clear path to defeating Donald Trump. Our democracy hangs in the balance.”"}]
